arts.sum: Kenneth Taylor's extra time penalty last month was enough to send Ajax into the last-16 of the Europa League after a feisty second leg meeting with Union St.Gilloise. The 2-1 loss to the Belgian side ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Ajax vs. Eintracht Frankfurt - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Europa League clash between Ajax and Eintracht Frankfurt, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
